Free Online File Compressor

Reduce the size of your images, PDFs, and documents instantly with our free online file compression tool. Fast, secure, and easy to use. Try it now!

PNG
WEBP
GIF
PDF
DOC
DOCX
XLS
XLSX
PPT
PPTX

RAR

MP4
TXT
30+ More

or

Max 100MB per file

Why Choose Our Compressor?

Advanced compression technology that delivers exceptional results every time

Fast Processing

Our optimized algorithms compress files quickly without long wait times.

Secure

Files are processed in your browser and never uploaded to our servers.

Multiple Formats

Supports all Image, Documents, Spreadsheets, CSVs, Archives, PDFs and Presentations formats with quality options.

Powerful Features

Everything you need for professional file compression in one simple tool

Multi-Format Support

Compress images, documents, spreadsheets, archives, and more with one tool.

Custom Compression

Choose your compression level and remove metadata for privacy and size savings.

Privacy First

All processing is done in your browser. Your files never leave your device.

Batch Compression

Compress multiple files at once and download them all as a ZIP archive.

Fast & Efficient

Optimized algorithms ensure quick results without sacrificing quality.

Mobile Friendly

Works seamlessly on desktop and mobile devices for on-the-go compression.

How It Works

Simple, fast, and secure file compression in just 3 steps

1

Upload Your File

Drag & drop or click to browse files from your device.

2

Choose Settings

Select compression level and other options if needed.

3

Download Result

Get your compressed file instantly with one click.
